description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house surrounded by tall, dense hedges and a perimeter wall, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. The house features two stories with a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a minimalist white facade. The front yard includes a gated entryway with a patterned metal gate and a driveway leading to a covered carport. The backyard is landscaped with palm trees and a swimming pool, while the side and rear boundaries are lined with lush greenery. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms and open-plan living spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a white minimalist facade, surrounded by tall hedges and landscaped gardens. Features include a gated entry, carport, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gate, driveway, carport, and the house's open-plan layout with large windows and a landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by tall hedges and a solid white wall, with minimal visibility of the house's interior or entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, palm trees, and the house's large windows facing the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, dense greenery, and the pool area, with the house partially obscured by foliage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a patterned metal gate, driveway, and covered carport; minimalist door with no porch or decorative columns
